description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-sup/

A stand-up paddleboard (SUP) experience at Naguri Lake is a gentle eco-tour for mind and body. You'll glide across the water's surface feeling the quiet lake and nature through all your senses, while learning about Naguri's ecosystems and natural beauty in an environmentally responsible way. The tour is open to beginners and no gear is required.

【Fee】
¥4,000 per person (includes guide, insurance, SUP board rental)

【Capacity】
5 people

【Guide】
Staff of the Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop

【What to bring】
Clothing that stays mobile when wet (rash guard, swimsuit, board shorts, swim trunks, capri leggings, or leggings). Life jackets are provided.

【More information】
Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop: https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: Beginner-friendly! SUP experience at Naguri Lake with no gear needed—a relaxing nature immersion
